title: Zoom: Zoom Push Notification Service Release: May, 2026 (No Operational Impact)
summary:
We will be performing scheduled maintenance to upgrade our Push Notification Service.

No operational impact is expected. This maintenance includes the following enhancements and improvements:

- Added available alert migration and capability-gated delivery enhancements, including the new client capability flag and migrated available-alert handling across presence and login flows.

- Added inbox expired-entry cleanup sync and zset-size observation/trimming controls, improving inbox consistency a

title: SmartDeploy: Connect Incident- Connect is Currently Down — identified
summary:
PDQ Connect is currently experiencing a service disruption that began at approximately 12:00 AM ET (04:00 UTC) April 17th. 

The issue is related to an unexpected database problem that has caused the application to be intermittently unavailable and has resulted in delays in deployment and device data processing. 

Our team is actively working to resolve the issue and restore full service. We apologize for the disruption and will provide updates as they become available.

title: Zoom: Announcing IP Address Changes (No Operational Impact)
summary:
The following IPv4 subnets will be removed from the Zoom Meeting, Zoom Contact Center, and Cloud Room Connector services. These IPv4 ranges no longer host resources and will be removed from Zoom’s inventory starting no earlier than 30 days from the posting of this notice. Due to this, we recommend that network administrators, with Zoom-specific firewall or network rules, update their systems as soon as possible in preparation. 

Removed Zoom Meeting and Webinar IP ranges:
4.34.125.128/25
4.35.64

summary: Apple has resolved the issue. iCloud users should no longer be impacted.

title: Calendly: Server Error
summary: Fix has been confirmed. Thank you for your patience!

title: Calendly: Issue Enabling Third Party Integrations
summary: This incident has been resolved for all users

title: Calendly: Outlook 365 Login Issues
summary: DNS issues affecting logins using the Outlook 365 service appear to have been resolved. If you experience any further issues, please reach out to support@calendly.com

title: Calendly: Zoom Video Conferencing Degraded Service
summary: Zoom has returned to full functionality and links should resume automatically generating. If you require any additional assistance please reach out to support@calendly.com.

title: Calendly: Google Login Issues
summary: All login services have returned to stable at this time.

title: Calendly: Degraded Connectivity with Zoom Video Conferencing
summary: Zoom has deployed a patch that resolves an issue with OAuth authorizations that affected a small segment of users. We believe that this issue has been resolved. If you continue to experience any issues, please reach out to support@calendly.com.

title: Calendly: Calendly.com experiencing issues
summary: Service has been fully restored.

title: Calendly: Calendly.com experiencing issues
summary: The team has resolved issues that were preventing users from loading calendly.com

title: Calendly: Issues for IE11 Users
summary: This morning our engineers identified an issue that may have caused users using IE11 to experience problems with the login and booking flows. All issues have been resolved and we are continuing to monitor to ensure stability.

title: Calendly: Outlook Desktop Plugin
summary: Outlook Desktop functionality has been restored for all users.

title: Calendly: Deleting an event in your calendar may not cancel Calendly events
summary: Google has resolved their API issues and all Calendly functionality is now restored.

title: Calendly: GoToMeeting Integration
summary: GoToMeeting APIs experienced issues that caused GoToMeeting events to not be created. The issue has now been resolved by GoToMeeting.

title: Calendly: Scheduled Maintenance: Status Page Migration to Incident.io
summary:
Whats changing?
On April 15, 2026 - April 17, 2026 we will start migrating our status page to incident.io. This migration is part of our ongoing efforts to enhance monitoring, observability, and platform reliability.

With incident.io, we’re integrating our incident response, on-call management, and post-incident reviews into a single platform, ensuring a smoother incident response process and the best support for our customers during incidents.

title: Zoom: Operational

title: Zoom: Zoom Workforce Management Update: April 19, 2026 (No Operational Impact)
summary:
We will be providing an update to Zoom Workforce Management. Please refer to https://support.zoom.com/hc/en/article?id=zm_kb&sysparm_article=KB0068337 for more details. 

This update includes adjustments to historical data for special days.

There is no operational impact. All services will be available during this scheduled update.

title: Calendly: Calendly Site Unavailable
summary: Calendly was down from ~9:09am EDT (13:09 UTC) to ~9:18am EDT (13:18 UTC).

title: PaperCut: PaperCut Hive - Some users are intermittently unable to release print jobs or experience intermittent loading in the Hive admin portal — Resolved
summary:
This incident has now been fully resolved. We have confirmed that print jobs are releasing successfully. 

Our apologies for any downtime that you experienced as a result of this outage. We will be performing a full retro and incident analysis, as we do with all issues that impact our customers.

If you experience other issues please report this via https://www.papercut.com/support/.

title: PaperCut: PaperCut Hive - Some users are intermittently unable to release print jobs or experience intermittent loading in the Hive admin portal — monitoring
summary: The issue is now resolved and the teams will continue to monitor the cloud services.

title: PaperCut: PaperCut Hive - Some users are intermittently unable to release print jobs or experience intermittent loading in the Hive admin portal
summary:
We're currently investigating an intermittent issue affecting PaperCut Hive's print release for the EU hosting region only. 

Users may experience intermittent slow loading of pages within the Hive admin portal.

We’re actively working to resolve the issues and will provide updates as they become available.

title: Omnilert: Omnilert Service Outage from 04/02/2026
summary:
On April 2nd, 2026 a production incident caused unavailability of Omnilert ENS administrative portals
and messaging services. The issue was identified and recified by Omnilert. 

Duration: 1h 45m
Scope: All Omnilert ENS Services
